productDisplayName: Vero Moda Women Simka Black Top
description: Style Note Taking the bright colours of summer and nature, vero moda inspires the woman of style and substance to experiment with this sophisticated black top. Mix and match this with a variety of colours and prints for a feminine look, or a modern twist. Product Details Black top, has a boat neck, laced yoke, short raglan sleeves that are elasticated on the shoulders, sash with two loops on the sides and a curved hem with slit sides Material and Care 100% polyester Machine wash in cold water at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular The model (height 5'8 and chest 33") is wearing a size M
